# Klienta

Public trust and commercial policy surface for Klienta — the white-label client portal boilerplate for AI agencies (Next.js 15 + Supabase + Stripe + Go worker + AI SDK + Model Context Protocol).

- Repository: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/klienta
- Klienta product page: https://byteworthy.io/boilerplates/klienta
- Boilerplates hub: https://byteworthy.io/boilerplates
- Services: https://byteworthy.io/services
- Contact: https://byteworthy.io/contact
- GitHub Pages site: https://byteworthyllc.github.io/klienta/

## License model

Source-available commercial license. Source code is provisioned to a private GitHub repository after purchase. Self-hosted on the buyer's own Vercel + Supabase + Stripe accounts. No monthly fee to ByteWorthy after purchase. No telemetry.

## Source repositories

- Klienta source: private, license-gated (provisioned after purchase)
- Sovra (open-source sibling, same multi-tenant lineage): https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/sovra
- Clynova (HIPAA-grade sibling boilerplate): https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/clynova
